levels.en: Blightshroom sprays parasitic spores at the nearest enemy, dealing <ATK>[[50%]] damage [[4]] times and attaching the spores to the target. Every [[3]]s, the spores release neurotoxins at adjacent enemies, dealing <ATK>[[20%]] damage. When the enemy hosting the spores is defeated, the spores automatically spread to the nearest enemy that does not already have spores, prioritizing non-summoned enemies. If the target is already a spore host, the spread immediately causes the target to release neurotoxins [[5]] times.
levels.zh: 朝以距离自身最近的敌人为目标喷射寄生孢子，对敌人造成[[4]]次<ATK>[[50%]]的伤害并使孢子寄生在敌人身上，寄生孢子每[[3]]秒向周围1格内的敌人喷射"神经毒素"，造成<ATK>[[20%]]伤害。被孢子寄生的敌人被击败后，寄生孢子自动传染至距离最近且未被寄生的敌人，优先选择非召唤物敌人。若目标已被寄生，则立即使孢子连续喷射[[5]]次"神经毒素"。

levels.en: Increases neurotoxin damage per hit to <ATK>[[30%]].
levels.zh: 每次"神经毒素"造成的伤害提升至<ATK>[[30%]]。

levels.en: While hosting spores, the target loses [[30%]] Phys & Magic DEF. The spores also absorb [[60]] Energy from their host every [[3]]s.
levels.zh: 孢子寄生期间，使被寄生的目标降低[[30%]]的护甲与魔抗，并且每[[3]]秒会吸收目标[[60]]点能量。

levels.en:
Passive. Blightshroom remains steadfast throughout battle.
Blightshroom rapidly grows mushrooms beneath the [[2]] nearest enemies, knocking them into the air and then knocking them down for [[1]]s. When they land, all adjacent enemies take <ATK>[[340%]] damage.
levels.zh:
被动地，自身在战斗中会一直处于稳定状态。
在距离最近的[[2]]名敌人脚下快速生长蘑菇，对目标造成击飞并使其击倒[[1]]秒，并在其落地时对周围1格范围内的所有敌人造成<ATK>[[340%]]伤害。

levels.en: Knocks targets into the air and knocks them down for [[1.5]]s.
levels.zh: 对目标造成击飞并使其击倒[[1.5]]秒。

levels.en: Knocks targets into the air and knocks them down for [[2]]s.
levels.zh: 对目标造成击飞并使其击倒[[2]]秒。

levels.en: Increases HP by [[8%]], Phys & Magic DEF by [[8%]], and ATK by [[4%]] during battle.
levels.zh: 战斗中，自身的生命值提升[[8%]]，护甲和魔抗提升[[8%]]，攻击力提升[[4%]]。

levels.en: Increases HP by [[16%]], Phys & Magic DEF by [[16%]], and ATK by [[8%]] during battle.
levels.zh: 战斗中，自身的生命值提升[[16%]]，护甲和魔抗提升[[16%]]，攻击力提升[[8%]]。

levels.en: Increases HP by [[24%]], Phys & Magic DEF by [[24%]], and ATK by [[12%]] during battle.
levels.zh: 战斗中，自身的生命值提升[[24%]]，护甲和魔抗提升[[24%]]，攻击力提升[[12%]]。

levels.en: Increases HP by [[32%]], Phys & Magic DEF by [[32%]], and ATK by [[16%]] during battle.
levels.zh: 战斗中，自身的生命值提升[[32%]]，护甲和魔抗提升[[32%]]，攻击力提升[[16%]]。

levels.en:
Blightshroom applies [[Spirit Mark]] to an allied hero behind, granting them Verdure.
Verdure: The [[spirit-marked hero]] deals [[20%]] more damage to enemies under control effects.
Blightshroom absorbs [[10]] Energy every [[0.5]]s from enemies under the [[spirit-marked hero]]'s control effects.
levels.zh:
使身后1名友方英雄成为[[灵能者]]，获得"繁茂"之灵能：[[灵能者]]对处于控制状态下的敌人造成的伤害提高[[20%]]。
处于[[灵能者]]控制状态下的敌人，每[[0.5]]秒汲取[[10]]点能量提供给瘴孢之菌。

levels.en: When all non-summoned enemies are hosting spores, the spores become hyper-active. Their neurotoxins deal an extra <ATK>[[20%]] true damage, and [[50%]] of the Energy absorbed each time is granted to the [[spirit-marked hero]].
levels.zh: 当所有非召唤物敌人均被孢子寄生后，寄生孢子进入活化状态，喷射的神经毒素会额外造成<ATK>[[20%]]的真实伤害，并且每次汲取能量的[[50%]]也会提供给[[灵能者]]。

levels.en: Blightshroom releases toxic gas that covers the entire battlefield for [[8]]s. While it lasts, all enemies lose [[20]] Haste and take <ATK>[[20%]] damage per second.
levels.zh: 喷射毒雾弥漫全场，持续[[8]]秒。持续时间内，所有敌人降低[[20]]点急速，并且每秒受到<ATK>[[20%]]的伤害。
毒雾每秒造成的伤害提升至<ATK>[[30%]]。
